name: TRANSACT TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: TransAct Technologies Incorporated designs, develops, and markets software-driven technology and printing solutions for food service technology (FST), point of sale (POS) automation, and casino and gaming markets. Key products include the BOHA! suite of terminals and cloud-based SaaS applications for back-of-house restaurant operations, the Ithaca 9000 POS printer used primarily by McDonald's, and EPICENTRAL casino gaming printers. The company sells to OEMs, value-added resellers, distributors, and directly to end users across the Americas, Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia, and the Pacific.

products.name: BOHA! Terminal / Terminal 2 / Terminal 2 LTE
products.description: Touchscreen terminals with integrated thermal printers for food rotation, grab-and-go, and nutritional labels in food service back-of-house operations.

products.name: BOHA! WorkStation
products.description: Back-of-house workstation using an iPad or Android tablet with thermal print mechanisms for food service labeling.

products.name: BOHA! SaaS Applications
products.description: Cloud-based subscription applications for temperature monitoring, checklists, task lists, and labeling accessed on Android and iOS devices.

products.name: BOHA! Enterprise Management System
products.description: System allowing over-the-air OS updates and restricting approved functions on BOHA! touchscreen devices.

products.name: Ithaca 9000
products.description: Thermal POS printer used primarily by McDonald's and other QSRs at checkout counters and self-service kiosks.

products.name: EPICENTRAL
products.description: Casino and gaming printing solution sold under the EPICENTRAL brand name.

products.name: AccuDate
products.description: Product sold under the AccuDate brand, part of TransAct's food service and labeling solutions.

products.name: TransAct Services Group (TSG)
products.description: Provides spare parts, service, labels, and accessories to TransAct's installed base of customers worldwide.

partnerships.description: TransAct acquired a perpetual, royalty-free license to the source code for the BOHA! software previously licensed from Avery Dennison, with transition services support.
Primary customer for the Ithaca 9000 POS printer used at checkout counters and self-service kiosks.
